name: Add Study->Family switch-CTA regression coverage for child entry surfaces (BRIDGE-04 path)
description: The bridge-backstack.spec.ts probe seeds Family mode directly, so the Study->Family switch-CTA->child-render path (the original WI-878 bug) has NO automated regression floor. The existing unit harness uses a static ProfileContext that cannot reproduce the optimistic setQueriesData(['profiles']) update.
acceptanceCriteria:
Add the missing regression floor for the Study->Family switch-CTA transition on child entry surfaces (BRIDGE-04). Confirmed gap: apps/mobile/e2e-web/flows/mentor-audit/bridge-backstack.spec.ts's seed (seedMentorAuditBridgeBackstack, apps/api/src/services/test-seed.ts:5506, comment block 5485-5505) sets defaultAppContext:'family' directly and never exercises the Study->Family switch-CTA transition; apps/mobile/src/test-utils/screen-render.tsx:224-233's profileContextValue is a plain literal (not backed by React Query cache state), so it cannot reproduce the optimistic setQueriesData(['profiles']) update the real switch-CTA flow performs. Guard-hold to regression-lock: switchingToFamily state in apps/mobile/src/components/guards/RequireFamilyContext.tsx (declared line 33, checked in the render gate line 45/59, set in handleSwitchToFamily line 101; disables the CTA while switching). Implementation is a genuine execution-time choice between (a) a new Playwright probe variant seeded in Study mode performing the switch-CTA, or (b) a React-Query-backed Jest test exercising RequireFamilyContext.tsx's switchingToFamily guard -- either strategy is acceptable. The new test MUST fail if the switchingToFamily guard-hold is reverted (red-green regression pattern) and pass with it intact. Test-only WI; RequireFamilyContext.tsx is exercised, not necessarily changed (the underlying bug was fixed earlier per WI-878; this only adds the missing regression floor). Boy-scout flag for the executor: apps/mobile/test-utils/screen-render.tsx (repo-root-relative, no src/) is a second, differently-sized file (281 vs 332 lines) -- confirm which harness the new test should extend, and whether the second file is dead weight (not required scope, just worth checking). Jest/Playwright-heavy WI: execute 

via a BRANCH checkout, not an isolated worktree -- this repo has known Jest Haste-map pathology inside .worktrees/ isolated checkouts (see feedback_worktree_jest_haste_pathology, feedback_branch_not_worktree_for_jest_work).
